title: Wax Melts - Pear and Freesia | 16 Pack | Strong Scented | Made in The UK | Plastic Free | Vegan
features: PEAR AND FREESIA WAX MELTS - this delightfully floral English cottage garden scent of delicate freesia and crisp pear on a base of patchouli and woody amber

LONG LASTING 16 PACK AND UP TO 96 HOURS OF FRAGRANCE - each 6.5g wax melts packs a real punch with up to 6 hours of scent per melt. Prefer a weaker scent just use 1/2 or use 2 melts for a stronger longer lasting fragrance. Suitable for tealight wax burners and electric wax warmers (ideally 40watts).
PLASTIC FREE AND COMPOSTABLE PACKAGING - we hate plastic so all packaging used is FSC certified and we even use compostable inner lining sheets to be totally eco friendly.
VEGAN AND VEGETARIAN FRIENDLY - we only use the highest quality cruelty free soy wax and paraben free fragrances for a superior clean burn and excellent scent throw.

MADE IN BRITAIN - all our wax melts are made here in Manchester by hand in our small family run business. Our suppliers are all in the UK too and pride themselves on manufacturing the highest quality materials.
description: Product description How To Use - Take a heart wax melt and place it in your wax melter. Either light a 4 hour tea light or switch on your electric burner. Enjoy the fragrance filling your home as the wax gently melts. Each melt will last up to 6 hours and sometimes longer depending on the individual fragrance and the type of burner you are using (burners and tea lights can produce different results). Once the scent is no longer noticeable remove the wax and dispose of it carefully in your general waste bin. Safety Warning [INFERRED] Keep away from flammable materials, do not leave unattended, monitor burn time, and dispose of properly.

specifications_table.Special features: ‎16 Heart Shaped Wax Melts, Soy Wax for a cleaner safer burn, Plastic Free, Made in the UK, Vegan Friendly - made using vegan friendly fragrance oils and waxes
